signals: Rapid change in models, tooling, and deployment patterns
More expectation to integrate third-party AI rather than build from scratch
Shorter cycle between experimentation and product pressure

workflow_change.before: Spent more time on custom modeling, experimentation, and pipeline tuning.
workflow_change.after: More time is spent on evaluation, integration, orchestration, and selecting between external and internal AI options.

actions: Reduced emphasis on building everything from scratch

outcome.early_effect: Role remains valuable, but the shape of expertise is shifting from pure modeling toward applied systems judgment.

narrative.summary: The role is not disappearing, but the center of gravity is moving from model creation alone toward evaluation, selection, and deployment judgment.
